sections.paragraph:
Original: מלכוּ

Transliteration: malkû

Phonetic: mal-koo'

BDB Definition:

  1. royalty, reign, kingdom
    1. royalty, kingship, kingly authority
    2. kingdom
    3. realm (of territory)
    4. reign (of time)

Origin: corresponding to H4438

TWOT entry: 2829c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
